channel.title: AI-Assisted Development on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in AI-Assisted Development on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Copilot-assisted coding & agent skills to build, deploy, and run Azure Functions faster in VS Code, CLI, and azd
item.description:
Azure Functions public preview adds Copilot-assisted coding and agent skills for building, deploying, and running Functions apps in VS Code, the CLI, and azd. The preview aims to improve AI help quality by providing Azure Functions-specific guidance.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: dotnet: Ten Months with Copilot Coding Agent in dotnet/runtime
item.description:
The .NET team reports on ten months of using GitHub Copilot Coding Agent in dotnet/runtime and summarizes lessons from cloud-AI-assisted development. The post is a data-driven retrospective rather than a feature release.

  • Source: .NET
